breakdown: PR adds 2 new test cases verifying debug_info precedence preservation and narrative fallback guard placement, along with uv.lock numpy version updates for Python 3.14+ compatibility. Tests use AST inspection to verify code structure rather than behavior, which is unusual but effective. The test names are descriptive though somewhat verbose. Limited visibility into implementation changes makes full quality assessment difficult.
key_changes: Updated numpy version specification in uv.lock with Python version markers
Reformatted existing test code for consistent style
Added retry test for MCP transient transport errors
